PostToolUse.bash: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // .tool_input.target_file // empty'); if [ -n "$f" ]; then case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.jsonc) pnpm run check --write "$f";; esac; else pnpm run check --fix; fi

Stop.bash: files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard); if [ -z "$files" ] || ! printf '%s\n' "$files" | grep -qv '\.md$'; then jq -n '{decision:"allow"}'; exit 0; fi; out=$(pnpm run check-types 2>&1); status=$?; if [ "$status" -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg reason "$out" '{decision:"block", reason: $reason}'; else jq -n '{decision:"allow"}'; fi
